headline: Rubio 🔥🇨🇺 SLAMS Cuba as US Threat 🛡️💥 & Castro Cuffed 🕵️‍♂️🔒
text: Marco Rubio 🔥🕶️💼 straight up DROPPED the BOMB 💣 on Cuba 🇨🇺 saying the island is a FULL ON national security THREAT 😱🛡️ to the US 🇺🇸 and the chance of a chill diplomatic PEACE DEAL 🤝 is LOWER than a broke TikTok star's bank account 💸😭! Cuba's foreign minister Bruno Rodríguez 😡📢 clapped back calling Rubio's tea ☕ all LIES 🤥 and straight up accused him of trying to INSTIGATE a military AGGRESSION 💥🔫 like he's stirring the pot in a political soap opera 🧼🎭! Rubio said diplomacy is still the VIBE but warned that Trump 🍊👑 has the RIGHT and DUTY to protect America from any danger like a boss dad defending his crew 🛡️💪! He also labeled Cuba one of the TOP sponsors of TERROR in the region 🌍😈 which Rodríguez denied HARD on X like it was fake news on steroids 📱❌! Cuba's suffering a major FUEL CRISIS ⛽🔥 worsened by the US oil BLOCKADE 🚫🛢️ plus epic blackouts ⚡😵 and food shortages 🍞😩 leaving folks hangry and in the dark! Rubio spilled that Cuba accepted $100M 💰 in US humanitarian AID 🆘 but Trump 🍊🚀 is putting the PRESSURE on like he's speedrunning regime change 🏃‍♂️💨 and openly talking about TOPPLING the communist regime 👑🔄! Just a day earlier the US CHARGED former prez Raúl Castro 🕴️ with MURDER over the 1996 plane DOWNING ✈️💥 that killed US nationals like it's a throwback true crime docuseries 📺🕵️! Acting AG Todd Blanche announced the charges in Miami and said they EXPECT Castro to SHOW UP either by his own WILL or ANOTHER WAY like he's getting extradited via Uber or something 😂🚕! Rubio also flexed on X that the US ARRESTED Adys Lastres Morera the sister of a top Cuban military official while she was living in Florida 🏠🌴 and allegedly helping Havana's regime like a secret double agent 🕵️‍♀️🤫! Trump 🍊👀 called Cuba a FAILED COUNTRY and said he's trying to HELP on a humanitarian basis while Cuban-Americans are ready to GO BACK and make it SUCCEED like a glow-up challenge on reality TV 📺✨! Trump teased that other presidents have been looking at this for 50-60 years but it looks like HE'LL be the one to DO IT and he'd be HAPPY to handle the mission like a boss-level quest 🎮🔥!
